requirements.description: Establish, implement, document and maintain a risk management system
requirements.evidence: 30-phase harness with L1-L4 gates provides systematic risk management
requirements.gaps: Formal risk register and periodic review cadence not yet established

requirements.description: Training, validation and testing data shall be subject to appropriate data governance
requirements.evidence: TOON format with traceability provides data lineage tracking
requirements.gaps: No formal data quality metrics or bias detection pipeline

requirements.description: High-risk AI systems shall be designed to be effectively overseen by natural persons
High-risk AI systems shall be designed to achieve an appropriate level of accuracy, robustness and cybersecurity
requirements.evidence: 567+ automated tests, sanitizeTaskName security, HMAC verification

requirements.description: Testing shall include adversarial testing as appropriate
requirements.gaps: PyRIT/Garak integration not yet implemented, only scaffold exists
